headline: Markets displayed classic late-cycle behavior as crypto surged on institutional adoption hopes while…
telegramText: MARKET WRAP — May 11, 2026 Markets displayed classic late-cycle behavior as crypto surged on institutional adoption hopes while traditional havens like gold held elevated levels amid Iran tensions and resurging inflation expectations. The risk-on regime masked underlying concerns about stagflation and geopolitical displacement, creating a fragile expansion narrative. CLOSING PRICES BTC: $81,803 · ETH: $2,337 · SOL: $97.64 · GOLD: $4,734 · SPY: $739.3 (+1.1%) · QQQ: $713.29 (+2.6%) · VIX: $18.38 (+6.9%) · TLT: $85.56 (-0.1%) · DXY: $97.93 (+0.0%) · OIL: $98.25 (+3.0%) EVENING NEWS ▲ Strategy CEO Suggests Potential Bitcoin Sales As BTC Price Reclaims $80,000 ▲ BTC, ETH & XRP Top Institutional Flows As Crypto Rebound Strengthens ▼ Tron in Trouble? ‘Glaring Divergence’ Flagged Behind TRX’s Latest Surge ▲ European Council restores full trade ties with Syria after 14 years ▲ Healthcare Firm Accendra Inks Discount Debt Exchange, New Funds ▼ Schroders Stays Clear of UK Bonds, Citing Risk Starmer Is Ousted SCENARIO SHIFTS ▲ Late Cycle: Rising inflation forcing hawkish central bank pivots ▲ Recession: Political instability and policy uncertainty growing ▼ Goldilocks: Inflation resurgence ending benign macro conditions ▲ Stagflation: Oil crisis driving inflation while growth concerns persist ▲ Hegemony: Iran tensions and political instability challenging established order ▲ Displacement: Massive crypto institutional adoption accelerating REGIME CHECK ▲ Risk-On · Neutral · EXPANSION · Gauge: 36.5/100 UPCOMING — HIGH IMPACT EU Markit Manufacturing Purchasing Managers Index (Preliminary)(May) — May 21, 08:00 AM UTC (prev: 52.2) Seasonally adjusted unemployment rate(Apr) — May 21, 01:30 AM UTC (prev: 4.3%) EU Consumer Price Index (MoM)(Final)(Apr) — May 20, 09:00 AM UTC (prev: 1.0%) EU Consumer Price Index (YoY)(Final)(Apr) — May 20, 09:00 AM UTC (prev: 3.0%) Real GDP (AQR) (Preliminary)(Q1) — May 18, 11:50 PM UTC (prev: 1.3%) starting value of nominal GDP annum (billion yen)(Q1) — May 18, 11:50 PM UTC (prev: 671554.90) CONTRARIAN • The crypto rally may be a liquidity-driven head fake as institutions are actually preparing to distr • Rising oil prices could force faster green energy adoption, making this energy crisis shorter than m agentcanary.ai | Not financial advice
